audio-music-generate.label: 纯音乐生成
audio-music-generate.description: Generates vocal-free, lyric-free pure music / BGM for background music, ambient mood, and emotional scoring, duration 30–120 seconds. `prompt` required; `duration` required, defaults to `30` seconds if not provided, auto-clamped to 30–120 seconds with notification. Suited for ambient/mood/background pure music, not for strong-rhythm or full song structures. Prohibited: songs with vocals/lyrics, strong-rhythm/high-variation instrumental music, adding audio to existing videos, structured song creation, audio editing.
audio-music-generate.description_cn: 纯音乐/BGM生成，无人声无歌词，支持多种风格和时长控制（30-120秒）。

audio-song-generate.label: 歌曲生成
audio-song-generate.description: Lyrics-driven complete song generation (with vocals), also supports strong-rhythm/full-arrangement instrumental music. `prompt` (style description) required; `prompt_lyrics` (lyrics) required for vocal songs, can be empty for instrumental; `model` (auto/mureka-6/mureka-7.5/mureka-o1, default `auto`) optional. When `prompt` conflicts with `prompt_lyrics` style, `prompt` takes priority. Prohibited: plain ambient BGM/background music, generating lyrics text only, albums over 5 minutes, dubbing/scoring for existing videos.
audio-song-generate.description_cn: 歌词驱动的完整歌曲生成（含人声），也支持强节奏/完整编曲感的纯音乐。

parameter_inputs.att_desc: 生成模型选择：auto 由系统自动决策；非法值回退至 auto choices: auto, mureka-6, mureka-7.5, mureka-o1

image-background-replace.label: 图片换背景
image-background-replace.description: Replaces image background/scene while preserving foreground subject, covering product scene swap, portrait background change, ID photo background color (white/blue/red), AI-generated target scenes. `image_url` required; `prompt` (target background description) optional, defaults to "white background" when omitted. This tool cannot output transparent backgrounds. Prohibited: transparent background output, removing specific objects from background, canvas expansion/outpainting, video background replacement, foreground content editing.
image-background-replace.description_cn: 替换图片背景/换场景，保留前景主体不变，支持文字描述目标背景。

image-cutout.label: 抠图
image-cutout.description: Precise foreground-background separation, covering standard 4-type subject cutout (person/pet/product/graphic stamp, outputs transparent PNG) and non-standard subject white-background cutout (buildings/plants/vehicles etc., outputs white-background image RGB 255,255,255). `image_url` and `prompt` (subject description) required. Requests involving "remove background/transparent background/transparent base/keep subject only" all belong to this tool. Prohibited: replacing background with new scene, removing specific objects, image cropping, video matting, cutout + background-replace combo.
image-cutout.description_cn: 分离前景与背景，提取主体或人物，输出透明背景图。

image-denoise-enhance.label: 图片去噪
image-denoise-enhance.description: Removes image grain/noise/color artifacts while preserving detail. `image_url` required, no `prompt` needed. Can be called on images without obvious noise but effect may be minimal. Prohibited: superres/quality repair, color adjustment, low-light brightening, video denoising, local denoising.
image-denoise-enhance.description_cn: 去除图片颗粒感/噪点/杂色，保留图像细节同时降噪。

image-edit.label: 图片编辑
image-edit.description: "Edits existing images or creates new images based on existing images (must have base image), covering 5 scenarios: e-commerce product imaging (white-background hero/scene/multi-angle/promotional text), portrait editing (face/makeup/hairstyle/pose), multi-image consistency editing (product fine-tuning/multi-image fusion/text content replacement), general editing (replace elements/add elements/adjust composition/background modification), reference-image creation (reference image as primary content source). `image_list` and `prompt` required; `model` (auto/gummy_pro/praline_pro/praline_lite/mint_edit/nougat, default `auto`) optional; when adding/rendering text onto images, text content is kept as user's original wording without translation. In design contexts, \"IP\" refers to character/mascot/brand imagery patterns—`prompt` should preserve \"pattern/character\" semantics."
image-edit.description_cn: 对已有图片编辑或基于参考图创作全新图片，支持电商产品出图/人像/多图一致性/通用编辑/参考图创作五类场景。

media_inputs.att_desc: 至少一张底图，可追加参考图

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
model 为 sub_api 的外部别名；auto 或不传时按 sub_api selection_rule 路由：
gummy_pro    → image_edit_portrait (image_gummy_edit_v45)
praline_pro  → image_edit_praline / image_edit (image_praline_edit_v2)
praline_lite → image_edit_lite (image_praline_edit_2)
mint_edit    → image_edit_fallback (image_mint_edit)
nougat       → image_nougat_edit（仅外部显式指定触发；不参与默认自动路由）
指定 model 调用失败时，仍按 sub_api 降级链继续重试。 choices: auto, gummy_pro, praline_pro, praline_lite, mint_edit, nougat

image-element-remove.label: 图片消除
image-element-remove.description: Removes watermarks/text/local objects, covering general watermark removal, semi-transparent document watermark removal, local object/element removal, specified text removal. `image_url` required; use `target` (watermark/text, default `watermark`) for general watermarks, `prompt` needed for specific objects/text. When user references specific text content, removes that specified text rather than all text. Prohibited: text replacement/modification, video watermark removal, mosaic/blurring, background replacement, cutout/removing entire background.
image-element-remove.description_cn: 去水印/去文字/去局部物体，支持批量文字清除和指定对象消除。

image-face-swap.label: AI换头
image-face-swap.description: Dual-image face/head swap compositing, replacing source face onto target scene image. `head_image_url` (face source), `sence_image_url` (scene base), and `prompt` required; prompts for supplement if fewer than 2 images, takes first 2 if more. "Use B's face on A" semantically assigns B=head, A=scene. Prohibited: video face swap, multi-person simultaneous face swap, outfit swap, portrait generation/hairstyle adjustment.
image-face-swap.description_cn: 将图1人物的头部和肤色替换到图2上，保留图2的姿态、服饰和背景。

image-grid-split.label: 宫格拆分
image-grid-split.description: Auto-detects grid dividing lines and splits single multi-grid image into separate images. `image_url` required, no need to specify grid count. Non-grid images processed with equal-split and notified. Prohibited: multi-image merging, freeform splitting, custom area cropping, image content editing.
image-grid-split.description_cn: 将单张宫格拼接图拆分为多张独立图片。当前支持四宫格(2x2)。

media_inputs.att_desc: 标准宫格布局的拼接图

image-id-photo-generate.label: 证件照生成
image-id-photo-generate.description: Generates standard ID photos from user portrait + specification, with auto outfit change + background replacement + compliance adjustment. `image_url` (front-facing portrait) and `spec_type` (1-inch/2-inch/passport/ID card/visa/driver's license etc.) required; `bg_color` (white/blue/red etc.) and `attire` (≤15 chars, default black suit + white shirt) auto-adapted per spec. `face_desc` filled based on 13-item observation of original photo, vague words like "moderate" or "medium" prohibited; retries with simplified prompt on failure, up to 3 rounds. Prohibited: artistic portraits, general image editing, background-only change without outfit, outfit-only change without background, face swap, poster design, auto-adding superres/exact pixels (degrades quality, only when user explicitly requests post-processing).
image-id-photo-generate.description_cn: 基于用户照片+证件规格一键生成标准证件照，自动换装换背景，支持合规调整。

image-lowlight-enhance.label: 图片暗部增强
image-lowlight-enhance.description: Intelligent brightening and shadow detail recovery for low-light/night/underexposed images. `image_url` required, no `prompt` needed. Normal-exposure images may appear too bright after processing. Prohibited: color adjustment/grading, superres/quality repair, denoising, video low-light enhancement, local brightening.
image-lowlight-enhance.description_cn: 暗光/夜景/曝光不足图片的智能亮度提升与暗部细节恢复。

image-outfit-swap.label: 图片换装
image-outfit-swap.description: AI outfit swap preserving person's face/body while replacing clothing only. `image_url` and `prompt` (target outfit description) required; `clothes_image_url` (outfit reference image) optional. Simple color changes (e.g. "change the skirt to red") also belong to this tool. Prohibited: hairstyle changes, video outfit swap, full-body appearance overhaul, face/head swap.
image-outfit-swap.description_cn: AI换装，支持文字描述目标服装或上传参考服装图，保留人物形象只替换衣物，主力模型失败自动降级。

media_inputs.att_desc: 人物图片（必填）；可选服装参考图
人物图片（必填）；可选服装参考图

image-portrait-generate.label: 写真生成
image-portrait-generate.description: Generates high-fidelity portraits from reference images (person/pet), covering portrait generation (ID photo/professional headshot/artistic photo/pet portrait/group photo/hairstyle adjustment) and dual-person composite/group photo synthesis. `image_list` (1–N person/pet images) and `prompt` required; `size` (2K/4K, default `2K`) optional. Local editing (makeup/face/posture changes) is not in this tool's scope. Prohibited: face swap/head swap, style transfer/creative effects, outfit swap, video generation, text-only generation without reference images.
image-portrait-generate.description_cn: 人像/宠物写真生成、双人合影合成，高精度人像保真，支持形象照/艺术照。

image-poster-generate.label: 海报生成
image-poster-generate.description: Generates brand-new posters with layout, supporting pure text description or product/portrait images as material input, multiple styles and sizes. `prompt` required; `model` (Gummy/Nougat/PralineV2/GummyV4.5/Praline_2, default `Praline_2`), `image_list`, `ratio` (default `auto`), `size` (default `auto`), `output_format` (default `png`), `enhance_prompt` optional. Model selection: default Praline_2, realistic portrait GummyV4.5, high-creativity PralineV2, general portrait Gummy, special style Nougat. Prohibited: secondary editing of existing posters (change background/text/elements/size), general image editing, pure image generation without layout needs, video/animated posters, general text editing outside poster context.
image-poster-generate.description_cn: 生成含文字排版的海报，支持中文与非中文，适用于宣传/广告/活动推广。

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
默认/综合 → Praline_2
写实人像 → GummyV4.5
高创意 → PralineV2
通用人像 → Gummy
特殊风格 → Nougat choices: Gummy, Nougat, PralineV2, GummyV4.5, Praline_2

image-search.label: 文搜图
image-search.description: Keyword image search / reverse image search with internal library + Pinterest joint retrieval. `prompt` (search term array) and `image_ids` (image ID array) at least one required; `query_mode` (search/retrieve, default `search`), `size` (1–20, default `4`), `source_type` (auto/internal/pinterest, default `auto`) required. Retries with synonyms when empty, returns not-found if still empty. Prohibited: image generation/AI creation, image editing/modification, video search, OCR/image understanding.
image-search.description_cn: 关键词搜图/以图搜图，内部图库+Pinterest联合检索，找参考图/素材/灵感。

image-style-transfer.label: 图片风格转换
image-style-transfer.description: Applies stylistic transformations to existing images (anime/oil-painting/watercolor/chibi/cartoon/3D/pixel/emoji and other explicit style keywords all belong to this tool), supporting single-image stylization and dual-image reference style transfer. `image_url` (1 image = original only, 2 images = [original, style reference]) and `prompt` required. Preset effects include chibi/emoji/Snoopy/Molly/Animal Crossing, single-image only; other single-image styles use general stylization; 2 images processed by illustration/non-illustration type. Creative portrait stylization belongs to this tool. Prohibited: non-stylistic image modification, realistic portrait generation, video creative generation, generating from scratch without source image.
image-style-transfer.description_cn: 图片风格化处理，预设效果仅 chibi(Q版)/emoji/snoopy/molly/动森 5 种，其他风格走通用风格化。

media_inputs.att_desc: 原图；若有风格参考图则传2张（原图+风格图）
原图；若有风格参考图则传2张（原图+风格图）

parameter_inputs.att_desc: model maps explicit style/edit backends: auto, praline_pro, praline_lite, mint_style, mint_edit, nougat
output ratio; only effective on the nougat route and ignored by other models

image-superres-enhance.label: 图片超清（分场景）
image-superres-enhance.description: Image clarity enhancement/super-resolution upscaling with auto algorithm selection by content type, covering general superres, e-commerce product superres, text/document superres. `image_url` and `prompt` (image content description, e.g. "e-commerce white-background product" or "scanned text document") required. Key distinction: "make clearer/HD" → this tool; "enlarge 2/4/8x" → geometric transform. Prohibited: denoising, color optimization, low-light enhancement, video superres, geometric scaling.
image-superres-enhance.description_cn: 按内容类型（通用/商品/文档）自动选择最优超清算法，提升图片清晰度。

image-text-replace.label: 图片改字
image-text-replace.description: Replaces existing text content on images (A → B), supporting simple precise replacement (standard print/single location/≤6 chars/same char count) and complex replacement (decorative/handwritten fonts/multiple locations/char count changes). `image_url` required; `source_words`/`target_words` conditionally required (required for simple replacement, can be auto-extracted from `prompt` for complex). Target text containing Chinese kept as-is without translation. Prohibited: removing/clearing text, adding new text to blank areas, video text editing, batch multi-image text editing.
image-text-replace.description_cn: 图片上的文字内容替换，支持标准印刷体简单改字和花字/手写/风格化复杂改字。

image-to-video.label: 图生视频
image-to-video.description: Generates dynamic videos driven by images, covering single-image generation, multi-image reference fusion (1–9 images), first-last frame transition (1–2 images). `image_list` (1–9) and `prompt` required; `mode` (auto/i2v/mi2v/flf, default `auto`; mode takes priority when mode and model conflict), `model` (auto/toffee/bonbon, default `auto`), `video_duration` (4–15, default 5), `sound` (off/on, default `off`), `aspect_ratio` (default `adaptive`), `multi_shot` (default true) optional. Single image defaults to toffee with bonbon fallback (`aspect_ratio` params silently dropped on fallback); single-image reference intent routes to multi-image fusion; two images default to first-last frame. Other parameters (shot_type / resolution / reference_video_list / reference_audio_list, etc.) are managed internally by the combo-tool and not exposed externally. Prohibited: text-only video generation, motion transfer, audio-driven generation, video editing/modification, applying effects to video, image count >9.
image-to-video.description_cn: 基于图片生成高保真视频，支持超大动作幅度与精细运镜，具备极强的人物动态一致性与物理规律模拟。

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
显式指定 mode 时优先级高于图片数量/意图推断，直接走对应路径：
mode=i2v → image_to_video (video_toffee_i2v_v20)，失败兜底 image_to_video_adv (video_bonbon_img2vid_v30)
mode=mi2v → image_to_video_multi (video_toffee_mi2v_v20)
mode=flf → image_to_video_frames (video_toffee_flf_v20)
mode=auto 或不传 → 按图片数量+意图自动决策（见 sub_api selection_rule）
mode 与 model 同时指定且冲突时，mode 优先 choices: auto, i2v, mi2v, flf

底层模型选择：
model=toffee → 走 toffee 系列 API（video_toffee_i2v_v20 / video_toffee_mi2v_v20 / video_toffee_flf_v20）
model=bonbon → 走 video_bonbon_img2vid_v30
model=auto 或不传 → 按路由规则自动决策
与 mode 冲突时 mode 优先 choices: auto, toffee, bonbon

image-transform.label: 图片变换
image-transform.description: Image geometric transformation (no content changes), covering rotation/flip (-180°~180°), proportional upscale (2/4/8x), lossless proportional downscale, canvas expansion/outpainting (AI smart fill, can expand portrait-to-landscape or reverse, defaults to 3:4 ratio when unspecified). `image_url` required, per-scenario parameters as needed. Downscale target larger than original auto-converts to upscale, equal returns original; outpaint target smaller than original rejected. Key distinction: "enlarge Nx/shrink to 800w" → this tool; "make clearer/HD/upscale to 4K" → superres. Prohibited: GIF input, resolution-target superres, superres/quality repair, local rotation, image content editing, video canvas expansion, image cropping.
image-transform.description_cn: 图片几何变换（旋转/翻转/等比放大/缩小/画布扩展），不改变图片内容。

text-code.label: 代码生成
text-code.description: Generates React/TSX page code from scratch with material reference and prompt expansion support. `prompt` required; `model` (pretzel_pro/pretzel_lite, default `pretzel_pro`), `image_list`, `video_list`, `prompt_name` as needed. Prohibited: modifying existing source code, non-React/HTML frameworks, backend code, pixel-perfect design reproduction.
text-code.description_cn: 从零生成React/TSX页面代码，支持素材参考和prompt扩写。

parameter_inputs.att_desc: 模型选择：默认 pretzel_pro，失败降级 pretzel_lite；非法值 → pretzel_pro choices: auto, pretzel_pro, pretzel_lite

text-code-edit.label: 代码编辑
text-code-edit.description: Edits existing React/TSX/JSX source code with multi-round iteration support. `prompt` and `source_code_url` (auto-takes most recent `code_url` from context when missing) required; `model` (pretzel_pro/pretzel_lite, default `pretzel_pro`) as needed. Prohibited: generating from scratch, non-React/HTML frameworks, backend code modification, pixel-perfect reproduction.
text-code-edit.description_cn: 对已有TSX/JSX源码进行编辑修改，支持多轮迭代和串联编辑。

parameter_inputs.att_desc: 模型选择：默认 pretzel_pro，失败降级 pretzel_lite choices: auto, pretzel_pro, pretzel_lite

text-generate.label: 文本生成
text-generate.description: General copywriting generation/creation/polishing, covering marketing copy, product descriptions, social media copy, video storyboard planning, video prompt optimization, etc. `summary` and `language` required; `image_list`/`video_list` as needed. `model` (scone/pretzel_pro): pass `pretzel_pro` for complex scenarios (video input, long context, complex reasoning, professional domains); omit or pass `auto` for daily scenarios. Prohibited: video/image/audio/code generation, table output.
text-generate.description_cn: 通用文案生成、文本创作与润色、多语言文案、多模态参考文案生成、分镜脚本/故事板描述生成、视频提示词润色。

media_inputs.att_desc: 可选参考图片 URL 数组
可选参考视频 URL 数组

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
语言模型选择：
model=pretzel_pro 或有视频输入/长上下文(>2000字)/复杂推理/专业领域 → pretzel_pro (gemini-3.1-pro-preview)
model=scone 或 auto/不传/日常场景 → scone (qwen3.6-vl-plus)
调用失败 → 切换另一模型重试 choices: auto, scone, pretzel_pro

text-to-image.label: 图片生成
text-to-image.description: "Generates brand-new images from text descriptions from scratch (no base image); reference images serve only as style/mood supplements, not as content subjects. Covers general text-to-image/multi-image reference fusion and commercial-grade high-quality generation, supports generating images at specified resolution (e.g. 4K wallpaper). `prompt` required; `model` (auto/nougat/gummy/praline_pro, default `auto`), `size` (1K/2K/4K, default `2K`), `ratio` and `image_list` optional. `image_list` and `ratio` are mutually exclusive — `ratio` not supported when `image_list` is provided. `output_format` is managed internally by the combo-tool and not exposed externally. Prohibited: editing existing images, reference-image-driven creation (reference image as primary content source), portraits/pet photos/ID photos, poster/banner layout design, style transfer/preset effects, video generation, image search, quality enhancement/superres of existing images."
text-to-image.description_cn: 从文字描述（文字驱动）生成全新图片，支持通用创意生成与商业级高品质生成。

media_inputs.att_desc: 可选参考图 URL 数组

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
model 为 sub_api 的外部别名；auto 或不传时按 sub_api selection_rule 路由：
gummy       → text_to_image (image_gummy_generate)
praline_pro → text_to_image_praline (image_praline_create_v2)
nougat      → text_to_image_nougat (image_nougat_create)（仅外部显式指定触发；不参与默认自动路由）
指定 model 调用失败时，仍按 sub_api 降级链继续重试 choices: auto, nougat, gummy, praline_pro

text-to-video.label: 文生视频
text-to-video.description: Generates dynamic videos from pure text, covering high-quality default mode (4–15s, all ratios, 480p/720p, audio default on) and high-dynamic fast mode (3–15s, 16:9/1:1/9:16 only, 720p, audio default off). `prompt` required; `video_duration`, `sound`, `aspect_ratio`, `resolution` as needed. Prohibited: image-driven video generation, audio-driven generation, video editing, applying effects/style changes to video.
text-to-video.description_cn: 纯文字驱动，生成电影氛围感强、运镜丰富的视频片段，可含环境音。

video-audio-add.label: 视频配音
video-audio-add.description: Adds audio tracks to existing videos, covering BGM (matched music or custom `audio_url`) and narration voiceover; both can be added simultaneously. `video_list` and `prompt` required; `audio_url` (BGM only) optional; `music_volume`/`video_volume` (0–1) default per scenario. Prohibited: video stitching, stitching + auto-music combo, pure music/song generation, video frame editing.
video-audio-add.description_cn: 为视频添加背景音乐（BGM）或旁白配音，支持两者串联同时添加。

media_inputs.att_desc: 可选自定义音频URL（覆盖素材库BGM）

video-canvas-expand.label: 视频扩展
video-canvas-expand.description: Expands video frames outward (outpainting) with AI-filled extended areas. `video_url` and `prompt` required; `expand_ratio` (0~0.5, default 0.3) controls expansion magnitude per side; `directions` (any combo of left/right/up/down, default `left,right,up,down`) controls which sides to expand. Prohibited: video content editing, video duration extension, video cropping/shrinking, image expansion.
video-canvas-expand.description_cn: 将视频画面按方向 outpainting 扩展，AI 智能补全扩展区域，由 prompt 指引补全内容、expand_ratio 控制扩展幅度、directions 指定扩展方向。

parameter_inputs.att_desc: 每条边扩展比例（占原边长的比值），值在 0~0.5 之间。默认 0.3。值越大扩展面积越大、AI 补全难度越高

扩展方向，可选 left/right/up/down 任意组合（逗号分隔）。默认四方向全扩。
单方向：如 "right"
双方向：如 "left,right" / "up,down"
四方向：默认 "left,right,up,down" choices: left, right, up, down

video-content-replace.label: 视频内容替换
video-content-replace.description: Replaces content elements in videos (characters/scenes/clothing) while preserving original camera work and motion, supporting text-driven and reference-image-driven modes. `video_url` and `prompt` required; `image_url` optional, prioritizes reference-image mode when present. Prohibited: video generation, watermark/subtitle removal, video style transformation, audio modification, video stitching.
video-content-replace.description_cn: 基于文本指令或参考图片，替换/修改视频中的人物、场景、服装等内容元素，保留原始运镜和动作。

media_inputs.att_desc: 原视频。参考图模式下须满足：mp4/mov 格式、≤100MB、边长 340-3850px、时长 3-30s、一镜到底、1 人清晰全身
可选参考图（有参考图路由到 content_refimg）

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
combo-tool 对外暴露的模型选择字段：
auto（默认）按本卡片路由规则决策（按 image_url 是否存在分支到 instruct/refimg）
molasses 显式指定走 video_molasses_edit / video_molasses_vidimgs2vid（仍按 image_url 分支） choices: auto, molasses

video-denoise-enhance.label: 视频去噪
video-denoise-enhance.description: Removes video grain/color banding/motion noise. `video_url` required, no `prompt` needed. More severe noise yields more visible results; ineffective for non-noise issues. Prohibited: comprehensive quality repair, video superres, low-light brightening, image denoising, frame interpolation.
video-denoise-enhance.description_cn: 去除视频颗粒感/色块/运动噪声，保留画面细节同时降噪。

video-effect-apply.label: 视频创意生成
video-effect-apply.description: Applies creative effects to existing videos or images, covering preset style effects (video input), AI creative effects (image input only), long-video style redrawing (anime/pixel/clay etc.). `prompt` required; `video_url` or `image_url` per scenario. `effect_id` auto-matched internally based on `prompt`, not an external parameter. Prohibited: video content replacement, video element removal, video quality repair, video canvas expansion, text-only video generation, video stitching.
video-effect-apply.description_cn: 对已有视频或图片施加创意处理，3 类场景：预设特效（视频）/ AI 创意（图片）/ 长视频转绘，含 2 个内部兜底通道。

media_inputs.att_desc: 原视频 URL（预设特效和长视频转绘场景必填）
图片 URL（AI 创意效果场景必填，无需视频）

parameter_inputs.att_desc:
combo-tool 对外暴露的模型选择字段：
auto（默认）按本卡片路由规则决策（按输入类型 + prompt 信号词分发）
molasses 显式指定走 video_molasses_edit（视频输入兜底）
bonbon 显式指定走 video_bonbon_img2vid_v30（图片输入兜底） choices: auto, molasses, bonbon

video-element-remove.label: 视频消除
video-element-remove.description: Removes pedestrians/subtitles/watermarks/logos from videos, supports one-click clear-all. `video_url` and `prompt` required. Subtitle and watermark removal can run in parallel; clear-all is mutually exclusive with subtitle/watermark (clear-all includes both); clear-all requires secondary confirmation. Prohibited: adding logos/watermarks, video content replacement, image watermark removal, video quality enhancement.
video-element-remove.description_cn: 消除视频中的路人/字幕/水印/全部文字，支持多类型组合消除。

video-framerate-enhance.label: 视频补帧
video-framerate-enhance.description: Video frame rate upscaling/interpolation (e.g. 24fps → 60fps). `video_url` required; `frame_rate` (24/30/60, default `60`) optional; illegal values clamped to nearest legal value. Not called when target framerate ≤ original. Prohibited: comprehensive quality repair, superres, denoising, speed change/duration change, editing/stitching.
video-framerate-enhance.description_cn: 视频帧率提升/插帧，让低帧率视频运动更流畅，支持目标24/30/60fps。

video-logo-add.label: 视频加Logo
video-logo-add.description: Overlays logo/watermark images at video corners, supports transparent PNG. `video_url` and `logo_url` required; `position` (top-left/top-right/bottom-left/bottom-right, default `top-right`) optional. Prohibited: free positioning, removing watermarks, pure text watermarks, adding watermarks to images, video content replacement.
video-logo-add.description_cn: 为视频四角定位叠加Logo/水印图片，支持透明底PNG。

video-lowlight-enhance.label: 视频暗部增强
video-lowlight-enhance.description: Video shadow detail recovery / low-light brightening. `video_url` required, no `prompt` needed. Normal-lighting video may overexpose after processing. Prohibited: comprehensive quality repair, superres, denoising, image low-light enhancement, video color grading.
video-lowlight-enhance.description_cn: 视频暗部细节恢复、暗光环境提亮、高光阴影平衡调整。

video-motion-transfer.label: 视频动作迁移
video-motion-transfer.description: Transfers motion poses from reference video onto image person while preserving appearance. `image_list` (1 person image), `reference_video_list` (1 video, ≤15s), and `prompt` required; `video_duration` (3–15s, default `5`), `aspect_ratio` optional. Requires both person image and motion video with action-mimicking intent. Prohibited: text-only video generation, camera/style reference from video, face/character swap, video content editing.
video-motion-transfer.description_cn: 将参考视频中的人物动作迁移到目标人物/角色上，驱动目标执行相同动作。

video-multimodal-generate.label: 多模态视频
video-multimodal-generate.description: Multimodal mixed-driven video generation combining any of audio/video/image/text, suited for music-to-video, camera movement/rhythm reference from video, multi-material mixed generation. `prompt` required; `image_list` (≤9) / `reference_video_list` (≤3, total ≤15s) / `reference_audio_list` (≤3, total ≤15s) at least one multimedia type required (total ≤12); `video_duration` (default `-1` smart), `sound`, `ratio`, `resolution` optional. Prohibited: text-only video generation, image-only video generation (without video or audio), motion transfer.
video-multimodal-generate.description_cn: 支持音频/视频/图片/文字任意组合的多模态混合驱动生成视频。

video-quality-enhance.label: 视频画质修复
video-quality-enhance.description: Comprehensive video quality repair (deblur/denoise/frame interpolation/shadow brightening), auto-adapting to portrait/concert/anime/night/product scenes. `video_url` and `prompt` (video content description) required; write "general video" when uncertain. Does not accept `target_resolution`, does not handle resolution/superres/upscale requests, does not process images.
video-quality-enhance.description_cn: 视频画质修复，去模糊+降噪+补帧+暗部提亮，自适配人像/演唱会/动漫/夜景/商品全场景，不处理分辨率。

video-resolution-upscale.label: 视频分辨率超分
video-resolution-upscale.description: Dedicated video resolution super-resolution targeting 720P/1080P/2K/4K, pixel-level reconstruction only without quality repair. `video_url` required; `target_resolution` must be explicitly provided by user (no default), must be higher than original resolution; when user doesn't specify exact value (e.g. "resolution too low", "upscale"), must ask for target resolution (720P/1080P/2K/4K). Does not handle quality repair without resolution intent, does not process image superres.
video-resolution-upscale.description_cn: 专项视频分辨率超分，支持目标 720P/1080P/2K/4K，仅做像素级分辨率重建，不修复画质。

video-stitch.label: 视频拼接
video-stitch.description: Sequential multi-segment video stitching, covering plain stitch with original audio and stitch + auto-music. `video_list` (≥2 segments) and `prompt` required; `video_volume` (0–1, default `1`) optional. Does not support specifying specific music URL (requires upper-level orchestration), does not support custom transitions. Prohibited: single video trimming/speed change, narration voiceover, GIF conversion, video style transformation.
video-stitch.description_cn: 多段视频顺序拼接，支持纯拼接保留原声或拼接同时自动配乐。

video-to-gif.label: 视频转GIF
video-to-gif.description: Converts video to GIF, covering standard GIF (long edge ≤480px) and transparent-background GIF (240×240px); size not customizable. `video_url` and `prompt` required. Outputs transparent GIF when user requests transparent/sticker and video has solid/simple background. Prohibited: image-to-GIF, GIF-to-video, GIF editing, video stitching, video dubbing, video style transformation.
video-to-gif.description_cn: 将单个视频转换为GIF动图，支持透明底贴纸。
